name: io.github.RaulSimpetru/zotero-library-mcp
description: Add papers and books to Zotero by DOI, arXiv ID, or ISBN and manage your library

environmentVariables.description: Your Zotero user or group library ID
environmentVariables.name: ZOTERO_LIBRARY_ID

environmentVariables.description: Zotero API key with read/write permissions
environmentVariables.name: ZOTERO_API_KEY
